title: Update Employee Information (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Update Employee Information" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Update Employee Information

business.reason: Supports the Entity-Record Management business pattern for "Employee Management": Update Employee Information is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
business.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Update Employee Information
business.acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Update Employee Information" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Update Employee Information attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Update Employee Information attempted by a role without permission
Update Employee Information attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Update Employee Information succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Update Employee Information is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Update Employee Information.
permissionTests: Update Employee Information is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Update Employee Information -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
securityTests: Verify role-based access for HR Staff / Record Owner.
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-07 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Update Employee Information changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Update Employee Information succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Update Employee Information rejected with invalid data
Access: Update Employee Information rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
